project.name: Edit-Bak Hygiene Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned fixture for Sprint 22a P0-c: a real type in the main source root plus a STALE editor/agent scratch copy under src/main/java/.claude/.edit-baks/. Without the source-entry exclusion, JDT indexes the scratch copy as a duplicate type and pollutes search + call-hierarchy with phantom results; with the exclusion, only the real type is visible.
